hooks.command: c=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if printf '%s' "$c" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+(commit|push)'; then b=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$b" = "main" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Trunk Based Development: proibido git commit/push direto na main. Crie um branch (git checkout -b ...), commit e abra PR (gh pr create)."}}'; fi; fi
